EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User "{subject.account.name}" created sample document {object.name} belonging to category "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" changed sample document {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" deleted sample document {object.name} belonging to category "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
